note: unhingedthemes keeps ONLY the latest zip upstream, so the clean base of the version we ship is committed at base_zip_local (immune to upstream deleting older versions). upstream_zip_url is used by the watcher/adopt to fetch newer versions.
changelog: Hebrew subtitles overlay (kodirdil) + baked build defaults (cached-only fast search, non-blocking Hebrew match, meta_language he). 2.2.10: official TMDb network logos for the streaming-networks folder (11 icons).
